reviews.review_description:
This is a really fun application to hang out with your friends virtually. 
The graphics are really nice and the environments are different and refreshing from the other VR apps I've tried. 

I love that we can stream  360 video content in here including YouTube videos and watch them together with people. 

You can also download and login the app through a mobile device and hangout in the metaverse with friends who don't own a VR set, which makes this app way cooler.
Please add more content and environments, including a movie cinema.

developer_response.body:
Glad you like Vasoo Aaron :)

Our next update is going to include a lot of fun stuff. Stay tuned :)
